title: Hayfield's MC+
description: A take on DB's MC+ with extra mods for better performance and more QOL.
body:
A feature-rich, performance-optimized Fabric modpack built for Minecraft 1.21.5. Hayfield's MC+ blends enhanced visuals, in-depth stats, quality-of-life improvements, and immersive gameplay enhancements while maintaining strong performance on modern hardware.

This modpack includes:

Performance Mods: Lithium, Sodium, FerriteCore, Dynamic FPS, ImmediatelyFast, and VMP

Visual Enhancements: Iris Shaders, Entity Texture/Model Features, Complementary Reimagined shaderpack

Exploration & Worldbuilding: Explorify, JourneyMap (with WebMap), Waystones, Unwrecked Ships Plus 

Utility & QoL: BetterF3, Mouse Tweaks, Controlling, VeinMiner, ShulkerBoxTooltip

Customization & Stats: BetterStats, ModMenu, Held Item Info

Creative Tools: WorldEdit, CameraUtils, Silk suite RPG Elements: DailyQuests, Health Indicator, Dungeons & Taverns

Immersion: Sound Physics Remastered, Chat Heads, Custom Armor Trims

System Recommendations:

GPU: NVIDIA RTX-class recommended (workarounds applied for driver issues) CPU: Modern multi-core (Ryzen 5 3600 or equivalent) RAM: 8–12 GB allocated for smooth experience
